/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,@/Users/andromeda/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/nanobind/cmake/darwin-ld-cpython.sym -Wl,-dead_strip -Wl,-x -Wl,-S -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -o turboquant_ext.cpython-39-darwin.so CMakeFiles/turboquant_ext.dir/turboquant/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turboquant_ext.dir/turboquant/turboquant.cpp.o -F/Applications/Xcode-26.0.1.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/andromeda/marketing/turboquant/cpp -Wl,-rpath,/Users/andromeda/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/mlx/lib libnanobind-static.a libturboquant_lib.dylib /Users/andromeda/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/mlx/lib/libmlx.dylib -framework Metal -framework Foundation -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate
